title: GoalOS Front-Center Mission Studio use-case library

useCases.title: AI Research & Strategy Signoff
useCases.audience: AI consultants, agencies, clients, strategy teams
useCases.plainRequest: I delivered an AI research report to a client and need proof it is ready to accept.
useCases.goalosOutcome: GoalOS turns the report handoff into a reviewable Signoff: brief, claims, sources, freshness checks, limitations, reviewer decision, and Mission Receipt.
acceptanceCriteria: The assignment brief and prohibited claims are explicit.
Every material claim is mapped to a source or marked uncertain.
Freshness, broken-link, and required-section checks are complete.
The reviewer can accept, request changes, or reject.

useCases.title: Client Project Acceptance
useCases.audience: Consultants, agencies, software studios, enterprise buyers
useCases.plainRequest: My client needs a clean accept or changes decision for an AI-assisted project delivery.
useCases.goalosOutcome: GoalOS creates a delivery acceptance path: define done, map artifacts to requirements, expose gaps, route human review, and issue a receipt.

useCases.title: DAO Grant Milestone Release
useCases.audience: DAOs, grant committees, treasury councils, ecosystems
useCases.plainRequest: We need to release a grant milestone only if the proof package passes review.
useCases.goalosOutcome: GoalOS compiles a milestone proof package: promised scope, evidence, reviewer checklist, challenge boundary, and settlement-readiness decision.
acceptanceCriteria: Grant milestone is tied to objective evidence.
Challenge window and unresolved risks are visible.
Payment readiness is separated from public-site demo claims.

useCases.title: Audit Remediation Signoff
useCases.audience: Protocol teams, auditors, security reviewers, enterprises
useCases.plainRequest: We fixed an audit issue and need evidence that the remediation is ready to accept.
useCases.goalosOutcome: GoalOS turns remediation into proof: finding, patch, tests, replay, reviewer check, remaining risk, and acceptance receipt.
acceptanceCriteria: The fix is linked to tests or reproduction steps.

useCases.title: Protocol Upgrade Readiness
useCases.audience: Protocol foundations, governance delegates, validators, engineering leads
useCases.plainRequest: Before a protocol upgrade, we need the evidence, risks, rollback plan, and human authority in one place.
useCases.goalosOutcome: GoalOS creates an upgrade docket: scope, proof objects, readiness gates, rollback plan, review authority, and release recommendation.

useCases.title: AI Agent Work Settlement
useCases.audience: Agent operators, marketplaces, AI agencies, protocol teams
useCases.plainRequest: An AI agent completed work and should only be paid if the evidence passes review.
useCases.goalosOutcome: GoalOS separates agent output from accepted work: it builds proof, routes review, records limitations, and prepares settlement only after acceptance.
acceptanceCriteria: Agent work is tied to the mission brief.

useCases.title: Understand the 48 Mainnet Contract Rails
useCases.audience: Founders, protocol operators, auditors, analysts, nontechnical stakeholders
useCases.plainRequest: Explain the 48 GoalOS-created Mainnet contracts and which ones matter for my Signoff tier.
useCases.goalosOutcome: GoalOS maps each contract family to an understandable product function: commitment, evidence, review, reputation, payment, dispute, and governance rails.
acceptanceCriteria: Each contract has a plain-English role.
Each tier shows which rails are relevant.

useCases.title: Enterprise AI Pilot Acceptance
useCases.audience: Executives, procurement, compliance, AI platform teams
useCases.plainRequest: We ran an AI pilot and need to decide if it is ready for internal acceptance.
useCases.goalosOutcome: GoalOS turns a pilot into a governed decision: success criteria, evidence, risks, user impact, review path, and acceptance receipt.
acceptanceCriteria: Risks and prohibited uses are listed.
Evidence is mapped to the pilot brief.

useCases.title: RWA or External Claim Docket
useCases.audience: RWA teams, oracle designers, compliance reviewers, tokenization projects
useCases.plainRequest: We need a proof package for an external claim before it affects governance or settlement.
useCases.goalosOutcome: GoalOS packages the claim, provenance, evidence boundaries, reviewer authority, challenge path, and receipt before any downstream action.
acceptanceCriteria: The external claim is clearly bounded.
Unavailable or private evidence is marked.
Reviewer decision and challenge path are recorded.

useCases.title: Move-37 / RSI Breakthrough Governance
useCases.audience: Frontier labs, governance councils, research leaders, assurance teams
useCases.plainRequest: Govern a Move-37 breakthrough candidate with replay, stress tests, persistence gates, and a dossier.
useCases.goalosOutcome: GoalOS routes high-novelty work through deterministic invention governance: target, emit, filter, atlas, test-plan, eval, insert, promote, then dossier.
acceptanceCriteria: Stress tests and persistence gates are required.

useCases.title: Mission 001 Reproducibility Packet
useCases.audience: New visitors, auditors, technical reviewers, benchmark evaluators
useCases.plainRequest: Show me the benchmark-ready proof packet and how to inspect it.
useCases.goalosOutcome: GoalOS routes the visitor to Mission 001: contract, environment, tasks, baselines, proof bundle, replay log, ledgers, validator report, scoreboard, and claims matrix.

useCases.title: Public Stakeholder Questions
useCases.audience: Users, investors, partners, reviewers, press, community members
useCases.plainRequest: I am new. Show me what GoalOS is, where to start, and which page answers my question.
useCases.goalosOutcome: GoalOS provides a short answer, recommends a page, and opens the correct route: Signoff, labs, contract atlas, Mission 001, or RSI/ASI governance.
